draftMessage: Your payment is ready. Click below to lock in the real-time ZEC exchange rate and begin your 15-minute checkout window.
rateExplanation: The ZEC amount will be calculated at the exact moment you click. You will have 15 minutes to complete the payment.
orSendManually: or send manually using the details below
sendRemaining: Send the remaining {remaining} ZEC to complete your payment
overpaidMessage: An overpayment of {amount} ZEC was detected. Contact the merchant for a refund of the excess.
paymentDetectedDesc: A payment has been detected and is waiting for network confirmation. This page will update automatically once confirmed.
expiredRetry: Your checkout window expired. Click below to get a fresh ZEC exchange rate and restart the 15-minute payment window.
partialExpired: A partial payment of {amount} ZEC was received. Enter your refund address below to request a refund from the merchant.
expiredMessage: This invoice has expired. Please create a new order.
